issues.detail: Instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases.

scenarios.name: Set up pre-commit linting on staged files
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses npx husky init plus lint-staged with file-glob commands in package.json exactly as the skill documents, while baseline used older husky v4 hooks config.

scenarios.name: Run tests on pre-push only
scenarios.rationale: Treatment places npm test in .husky/pre-push and explains why heavy tests do not belong in pre-commit, matching the skill's guideline.
